name: Crunchy Peanut Crackers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a food processor, combine flour, corn meal, peanuts, salt & sugar. Pulse until the peanuts are finely chopped. Alternatively, chop the peanuts by hand and mix together with the flour, corn meal, salt & sugar.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the water and peanut butter until smooth. Add to the flour mixture and blend to form a cohesive dough.
4. Divide dough into 2 equal portions. Roll out each portion of dough on a floured surface into a rectangle, 3/16 inch to 1/4 inch thick. This dough is very crumbly, so fix any cracks that occur by pushing the dough back together with your fingers.
5. Cut the dough into squares (or use a cookie cutter for other shapes) about 2 inches across and place on an ungreased cookie sheet. Prick each cracker with a fork.
6. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes until the crackers are a deep brown. Cool on a rack. Serve as part of a snack.
